rows.label: tev001794_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh, hello, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0002
rows.name: I was just petting this cute dog.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0003
rows.name:
He was rubbing up against my legs and
snuffling. I think he really likes me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_JNK0010
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: tev001794_SEL0011
rows.name: Say the dog could tell that Himeri had a good heart.

rows.label: tev001794_JNK0020
rows.name: Tease

rows.label: tev001794_SEL0021
rows.name: Joke that the dog must have smelled some food that Himeri was hiding in her pockets.

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0004
rows.name: You're too kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's absurd! Who hides
food in their pockets?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0006
rows.name:
Petting a dog like this makes me
feel like we're back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0007
rows.name:
NLA is making progress, but it
still doesn't quite feel like
we're living the way we used to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0008
rows.name:
Having pets around is a good first step
for certain. But what else do you think
NLA needs to feel like Earth again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_JNK0030
rows.name: Movie Theaters

rows.label: tev001794_SEL0031
rows.name: Talk about how you miss movie theaters and big summer blockbusters.

rows.label: tev001794_JNK0040
rows.name: A Zoo

rows.label: tev001794_SEL0041
rows.name: Muse upon how you would like to visit a zoo.

rows.label: tev001794_JNK0050
rows.name: More Nightlife

rows.label: tev001794_SEL0051
rows.name: Rant about how there aren't enough bars, clubs, and casinos in this one-horse sleepy town.

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0009
rows.name: What a wonderful idea![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0010
rows.name:
NLA doesn't really have any
cultural institutions yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0011
rows.name:
A taste of film culture would definitely
make NLA feel a little more like Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0012
rows.name:
And I know everyone would be
excited about it. I'd really
like to see that happen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0013
rows.name:
But I'm not aware of any
film directors in BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0014
rows.name:
I suppose we'd have to
start back at square one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0015
rows.name: A zoo? That would be nice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0016
rows.name:
When we recover the Central Life,
we can use the DNA stored in there
to re-create the animals of Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0017
rows.name:
Then people could interact with
something that had previously only
been seen in old database records.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0018
rows.name:
This will be especially important
when we get our real bodies back
and start having children.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0019
rows.name:
The next generation of humanity should
be able to experience the creatures
with whom we once shared our world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now that we've recovered the Central
Life, we can use its DNA archives to
re-create the animals of Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then people could interact with
something that had previously only
been seen in old database records.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0022
rows.name:
This will be especially important
once we return to our real bodies
and start having children.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0023
rows.name:
The next generation of humanity should
be able to experience the creatures
with whom we once shared our world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0024
rows.name: That is a horrible idea![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0025
rows.name:
Rather than building such disreputable
institutions, I'd prefer we construct more
churches and temples of various faiths.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0026
rows.name:
That way we'll be able to grant peace
to everyone, no matter their creed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0027
rows.name:
But if for some awful reason they DO build
such dens of corruption as you suggest, I
don't want to catch you patronizing them, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0028
rows.name:
If you have that much idle
time on your hands, you should
be spending it at church.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001794_MSG0029
rows.name:
When you come, I will pray with
you in hopes of cleansing that
dark shadow from your soul.[ST:wait ]
